title: Crataegus divergens
intro: Crataegus divergens, also known as the divergent hawthorn, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, Rosaceae. The health benefits of Crataegus divergens are attributed to its potential to support cardiovascular health by reducing blood pressure, improving lipid profiles, and enhancing blood flow to the heart. The bioactive constituents of this plant include oligomeric proanthocyanidins (OPCs), flavonoids, and triterpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Crataegus divergens include standardized extracts, capsules, and tinctures, which are often used to promote cardiovascular health and reduce the risk of heart disease.
